name: Lobu
description: Lobu memory over MCP. Set mcpUrl to enable. Authentication via token, tokenCommand, or interactive device login.

mcpUrl.description: Full MCP endpoint URL (for example, https://lobu.ai/mcp/acme). Required.

webUrl.description: Public web URL for the Lobu memory instance (for example, https://app.lobu.ai). Used to generate links for the agent.

token.description: Bearer token for MCP requests. Optional — if not set, the plugin offers interactive device login.

tokenCommand.description: Shell command that prints a bearer token to stdout. Optional — used when token is not set.

headers.description: Optional extra HTTP headers for MCP requests.

autoRecall.description: When true, searches Lobu memory for relevant memories before each prompt.

recallLimit.description: Maximum recalled memory records per request.

autoCapture.description: When true, captures conversation observations as long-term memories after each agent session.

memoryWikiCompat.description: Spike/compat mode: register OpenClaw memory-wiki style tools (wiki_status, wiki_search, wiki_get, wiki_apply, wiki_lint) backed by existing Lobu MCP tools. Does not write a separate wiki vault.

fanoutTimeoutMs.description: Per-fanout timeout (ms) for SDK-backed wiki calls. Slow paths are dropped and the tool returns partial results with a degraded marker. Defaults to 30000.
